title: oxylobium ellipticum
intro: Oxylobium ellipticum, also known as the green raffia or New Zealand raffia, is a flowering plant native to New Zealand. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Oxylobium ellipticum include relieving digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Oxylobium ellipticum include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall health and well-being.
